title.zh: 托拉中的金钱与商业律法

description.en: Comprehensive guide to Torah's teachings on money, business ethics, interest, charity, honest dealing, and integrating spiritual values with economic activity.
description.zh: 关于托拉在金钱、商业伦理、利息、慈善、诚实交易以及将灵性价值与经济活动结合方面教导的综合指南。
description.he: מדריך מקיף להוראות התורה על ממון, אתיקה עסקית, ריבית, צדקה, עסקאות ישרות ושילוב ערכים רוחניים עם פעילות כלכלית.

references.text: If you lend money to My people, to the poor among you, do not act toward them as a creditor; exact no interest from them
You shall not oppress your fellow. You shall not commit robbery. The wages of a laborer shall not remain with you until morning
You shall not have in your pouch alternate weights... You must have completely honest weights and completely honest measures
You may lend on interest to a foreigner, but to your brother you shall not lend on interest
The first question asked of a person in the World to Come is: Did you conduct your business dealings with integrity?
Tzedakah is equal in importance to all the other commandments combined

author: Torah Light Content Team
practicalApplications: Using heter iska for business financing
educationalGoals: Understand Torah's comprehensive approach to money and business
Learn practical halachic guidelines for commerce
Apply ethical principles to modern business scenarios
Appreciate the spiritual dimension of economic activity
Build bridges between Jewish and Chinese business cultures

en: How can Torah business ethics provide competitive advantage in modern markets?
What are the practical challenges of implementing heter iska in today's financial world?
How do you balance the obligation to give tzedakah with personal financial security?
What does 'hasagat gevul' mean in the age of disruptive startups?
How can Jewish and Chinese business cultures learn from each other?
zh: 托拉商业伦理如何在现代市场中提供竞争优势?
在当今金融世界实施商业许可的实际挑战是什么?
如何平衡慈善义务与个人财务安全?
在破坏性初创公司时代,
犹太和中国商业文化如何相互学习?
he: כיצד אתיקה עסקית תורנית יכולה לספק יתרון תחרותי בשווקים מודרניים?
מהם האתגרים המעשיים של יישום היתר עיסקא בעולם הפיננסי של היום?
כיצד מאזנים בין החובה לתת צדקה לבין ביטחון כלכלי אישי?
מה משמעות 'השגת גבול' בעידן של סטארטאפים משבשים?
כיצד תרבויות עסקיות יהודיות וסיניות יכולות ללמוד זו מזו?

furtherStudy: Shulchan Aruch, Choshen Mishpat (Laws of Commerce)
Mishneh Torah, Hilchot Matanot Aniyim (Laws of Charity)
Rabbi Joseph Telushkin: 'Jewish Literacy' business section
